message:
feat(bench): add Criterion benchmark suite for Alien CS concurrency primitives

- 22 benchmarks across 8 groups: rcu_read (1+3 scaling), rcu_update,
  seqlock_read (cached/miss/3 scaling), seqlock_write (single/batched),
  ebr_pin (pin-unpin/pin-retire), ebr_retire (retire/advance),
  flat_combining (single/3 scaling), composite_pipeline (3-concept/4-concept)
- Thread scaling at 2/4/8 concurrent readers/writers
- Composite pipeline measures hot-path overhead of SeqLock+RCU+FC+EBR together

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,3 +48,7 @@ harness = false
 [[bench]]
 name = "condvar_bench"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "alien_cs_bench"
+harness = false
